cards.prompt: A dedicated new Thread runs on a different managed thread than the primary one and is not a pool thread
cards.code: using System; using System.Threading; int mainId = Thread.CurrentThread.ManagedThreadId; int workerId = 0; bool pool = true; var t = new Thread(() => { workerId = Thread.CurrentThread.ManagedThreadId; pool = Thread.CurrentThread.IsThreadPoolThread; }); t.Start(); t.Join(); Console.WriteLine($"different={mainId != workerId} worker_is_pool={pool}");

cards.prompt: A new Thread is foreground by default (IsBackground False); setting IsBackground=true switches it to background
cards.code: using System; using System.Threading; var t = new Thread(() => {}); bool before = t.IsBackground; t.IsBackground = true; bool after = t.IsBackground; Console.WriteLine($"before={before} after={after}");

cards.prompt: Five ThreadPool work items each atomically increment and signal a CountdownEvent(5); waiting on it yields a deterministic done=5
cards.code: using System; using System.Threading; int done = 0; var cde = new CountdownEvent(5); for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) ThreadPool.QueueUserWorkItem(_ => { Interlocked.Increment(ref done); cde.Signal(); }); cde.Wait(); Console.WriteLine($"done={done}");
